      public Game(double price, String name, String description, String photo, int stock, int numPlayers, String ageRange, GameStyle gameStyle, Category... categories)
      The game's constructor
      Parameters:
      price - the game's price
      name - the game's name
      description - the game's description
      photo - the game's photo's path
      stock - the game's stock
      numPlayers - the game's num players
      ageRange - the game's age range
      gameStyle - the game's style
      categories - the game's categories
